title: B-11 commit window opened
body: Coastal Cresting Prow opening git:index/head claim 1610dd2b-acfe-4923-92ad-12a65a92284c for a pathspec-scoped B-11 commit. Current staged set is empty; active claims scan showed no peer claims.
